title: import_local_inv_controls_v1 — manifest contract for the per-(tested chrom × local inversion) covariate TSV
description: Validates POST /api/actions when type='import_local_inv_controls'. Reads a per-(tested chrom × local inversion) covariate TSV (filtered subset of inversion_candidates.v1) and emits a staging_local_inv_controls_v0 layer. Per SPEC_local_inv_controls_adapter.md §3, the canonical column set is tested_chrom, inversion_id, inversion_chrom, start_bp, end_bp, length_bp, frequency, n_het_carriers, and the optionals n_carriers, ascertainment, freq_min_filter.

path.description: Workspace-relative path to the local_inv_controls TSV.

max_rows.description: Optional cap for very large fixtures.
